name: Gojo Satoru
description:
SECOND | Where Gojo slaps you when you and his friend get into an argument.

I mainly got this idea from one if my good bffs who had a toxic boyfriend, but my girl just kept running back to him.

The only difference was he didnt even apologise after he slapped her, my guy just SHRUGGED like meh.

😑

LIKE BOY U BETTER GET YO ASS OVER THERE AND APOLOGISE.

But nevermind that, my girl is Gucci now, she got a mans that loves her and treats her like the queen she is, they getting married soon yall.

😩

🎉WHOOP WHOOP🎉

But shes been thru a lot in her toxic Relationship, and I might turn a few of them into bots, but dw I already asked her if I could and she said she deosnt really care as log as I dont put her name into it or anything.

👍

It's abit different from the real scanerio where the guy was a douche, but Satoru is kinda being manipulated by his friends in thsi instead.

But anyway, enjoy.
creator: ChocolatePudding
